name: Underleaf
summary: A contemporary-feeling original world with a hidden depth. Story-forward; theater of the mind. Designed for the Quire framework.
ip: Original world and rules by Markus Gutschke. Mechanics adapted from Quire v0.1 reference rules.
contentNotes: Mature themes (violence, drugs, intimacy, romance) used in service of story, never gratuitously.
Existential and identity-shaping themes: what it means to want, to remember, to be real.
Mild horror and uncanny atmosphere as the campaign progresses.
